disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe constant upper-central abdominal pain boring straight through to the back, about 24 hours
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and where does it go?
How long has this been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's high in the middle of my stomach and it bores straight through to my spine. It's been constant for about a day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain eased by sitting forward and worsened by lying supine (positional relief)
trigger_question_examples: Is there any position that makes the pain better or worse?
What happens when you lie flat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: If I sit up and lean forward it eases off a bit, but lying flat on my back makes it much worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Repeated profuse bilious vomiting (>10 episodes) with inability to tolerate any oral fluids
trigger_question_examples: Have you been vomiting, and can you keep fluids down?
How many times have you been sick?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've thrown up more than ten times since yesterday, it's greenish and bitter, and I can't keep even a sip of water down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent heavy binge alcohol consumption immediately preceding onset
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any alcohol recently?
What were you doing in the day or two before this started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a pretty heavy weekend of drinking right before this all kicked off.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't usually drink that much... it was just the weekend.

trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers or felt hot and cold?
Did you feel like you had a temperature overnight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I felt pretty hot overnight, like I had a bit of a temperature.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Signs of dehydration/volume loss — weakness, lethargy, dry mouth, pale and unwell appearance
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself — weak, dizzy, lightheaded?
When did you last pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really weak and wrung out, my mouth is bone dry, and I haven't been to the toilet much.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Over-the-counter paracetamol taken with no relief
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain, and did it help?
Did the paracetamol do anything for it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took some paracetamol from the chemist but it did absolutely nothing.
